data.title: BW Energy acquires 10% in Block 14 and 5% in Block 14K offshore Angola from Azule Energy, strengthening its regional presence.
data.description: In collaboration with Maurel & Prom, BW Energy has entered into a consortium agreement to purchase a total of 20% non-operated stake in Block 14 and 10% in Block 14K situated offshore Angola from Azule Energy. Following this deal, BW Energy will hold a net interest of 10% in Block 14 and 5% in Block 14K. This move will grant BW Energy a significant presence in Angola, in line with the company's enduring regional expansion plan.

data.title: AB “Tewox” completes EUR 8 million retail park in Utena, Lithuania. First store “Iki” opens, with total tenants occupying 3,200 sqm.
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, on December 12, 2025, UAB “Janonio 27”, under the management of investment company AB “Tewox”, has finished building a retail park in Utena. Starting on December 12, 2025, "Iki" will commence operations in the park. Following shortly, "Žalia stotelė" and clothing retailer "Sinsay" will inaugurate their establishments. Collectively, these tenants will utilize approximately 3,200 square meters within the retail park.

data.title: Wendel Investor Day reveals plan to generate over €7 billion in cash flow by 2030, return at least €1.6 billion to shareholders.
data.description: Wendel is undergoing significant changes, aiming to create two robust value generation mechanisms projected to produce over €7 billion in cash flow by the conclusion of 2030. Additionally, they plan to allocate a minimum of €1.6 billion to shareholders as returns.

data.title: COMEUP 2025 in Seoul gathers 275 startups from 46 countries, showcasing global innovation in a three-day festival.
data.description: South Korea is currently playing host to 275 startup companies hailing from 46 different countries. The event has brought together founders, investors, and major corporations on a global scale. Taking place in Seoul, this gathering is being organized by the Ministry of SMEs and Startups (MSS) under the leadership of Minister Sungsook Han and the Korea Startup Forum (KSF) presided over by Chairman Sangwoo Han.
South Korean trade ministry: Talks with China on rare earth trades to continue.
Samsung Securities’ roadmap for the future AI revolution: “2027 will mark the first year of on-device AI.”

data.title: LHV Pank upgrades EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS share price target to 21.0 euros from 20.0 euros, with a new "buy" rating.
data.description: LHV Pank has revised their equity research on EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS (EFT1T) shares, increasing the price target from 20.0 euros to 21.0 euros. The shares have also been upgraded to a “buy” rating. The previous price target for EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS shares was determined in May 2025.

data.title: Tree Digital Insurance Agency named Fastest Growing Provider in Saudi Arabia at 2025 Global Brand Awards in London.
data.description: In London on December 12, 2025, it was announced that tree was honored as the Fastest Growing Digital Insurance Provider in Saudi Arabia at the prestigious Global Brand Awards by Global Brands Magazine (GBM). This recognition celebrates exceptional accomplishments in various sectors.

data.title: CFTC exempts prediction markets, including Polymarket US, from swap data reporting and record-keeping rules.
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) issued "no-action" letters to a set of prediction markets, such as Polymarket US, relieving them from the obligation to comply with swap data reporting and record-keeping rules.
JCDecaux plans to sell more of its APG|SGA stake to NZZ, boosting its total shares to around X%.

data.title: SEALSQ Corp names Rolf Gobet as Director of Geneva Quantum Center for developing advanced technology.
data.description: Today, in Geneva, Switzerland, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) revealed the appointment of Rolf Gobet as Director of its Geneva Quantum Center of Excellence. SEALSQ specializes in the development and sale of Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products. This appointment underscores the company's commitment to advancing in the field.

data.title: BNP Paribas in talks with Holmarcom to sell BMCI in Morocco.
data.description: In recent data released by health authorities, it was reported that there have been a total of 15,743 confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the region, with 385 new cases recorded in the past 24 hours. The number of fatalities due to the virus has reached 247, with 10 new deaths reported yesterday. Hospitalizations have also seen an increase, with 189 patients currently being treated for COVID-19. The local government has reiterated the importance of following safety guidelines and getting vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus.
Proposed transaction expected to boost BNP Paribas’ CET1 ratio by +15 bps.

data.title: Lululemon, Broadcom, & 3 stocks to watch on Friday: Johnson Outdoors Inc. expects quarterly loss of 68 cents per share on $117.24M revenue; Costco reports better-than-expected financial results for Q1 of fiscal 2026.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading with mixed results. Investors are likely to focus on Johnson Outdoors Inc. (NASDAQ: JOUT) as Wall Street expects the company to report a quarterly loss of 68 cents per share on revenue of $117.24 million. In after-hours trading, Johnson Outdoors shares increased by 1.2% to $43.50. On the other hand, Costco Wholesale Corp. (NASDAQ: COST) surprised investors with better-than-expected financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026. Costco reported first-quarter revenue that exceeded expectations. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tsunagaru Inc. and Sapporo showcase green transformation in media tour, offering insights to foreign reporters.
data.description: In December 2025 in Osaka, Japan, Tsunagaru Inc. partnered with the City of Sapporo to organize a press tour for international journalists in November. The tour showcased Sapporo's innovative green transformation (GX) efforts as the city strives to position itself as a leader in sustainability in Asia.
